# Arbeloa Out — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A sports voting campaign website called 'Arbeloa Out' where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes. It is inspired by a similar existing site (mbappeout.replit.app) and should replicate its functionality and design style — a bold, fan-driven protest campaign page focused on engagement and virality.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://arbeloa-out-45b3f881.zappy5.app
A sports voting campaign website called &#39;Arbeloa Out&#39; where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://arbeloa-out-45b3f881.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://arbeloa-out-45b3f881.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Arbeloa Out
A sports voting campaign website called 'Arbeloa Out' where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes. It is inspired by a similar existing site (mbappeout.replit.app) and should replicate its functionality and design style — a bold, fan-driven protest campaign page focused on engagement and virality.

## Target Audience
- אוהדי כדורגל שרוצים להצביע להעיף את ארבלואה
- Football Fanatics
- Real-Time Voters
- Discontent Fans

## Industry
ספורט / כדורגל

---

- Robots: https://arbeloa-out-45b3f881.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://arbeloa-out-45b3f881.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
